window.label: Entire history
window.phrase: the entire available history up to 2026-07-22

evidence.claim: AD Ports Group invests $220 million in a new bulk and general cargo terminal at Karachi Port in mid-2024.
evidence.snippet: AD Ports Group finalized a transaction to invest $220 million over several years to develop multi-purpose terminals at Pakistan's Karachi Port.

evidence.claim: The UAE rolls over a $2 billion loan deposit at the State Bank of Pakistan in January 2025 to support reserves.
evidence.snippet: The United Arab Emirates formally extended the maturity of its $2 billion bilateral loan deposit with Pakistan's central bank.

evidence.claim: Masdar signs a framework agreement to develop 1 GW of solar power projects in Pakistan in November 2024.
evidence.snippet: Masdar signed a key framework agreement with Pakistan's Ministry of Energy to target 1 GW of clean energy generation capacity.

evidence.claim: e& finalizes its acquisition of Telenor Pakistan to merge operations with Ufone in late 2024.
evidence.snippet: e& Group obtained final regulatory clearance from Pakistan's antitrust commission to acquire Telenor Pakistan's local operations.

evidence.claim: DP World signs a framework agreement with Pakistan to build a dedicated freight corridor from Karachi Port in October 2024.
evidence.snippet: DP World and Pakistan signed inter-governmental framework agreements to construct a dedicated rail freight corridor and inland container depot.

evidence.claim: EDGE Group signs a strategic partnership with Pakistan's GIDS for precision-guided munition technology in December 2024.
evidence.snippet: EDGE Group partnered with Global Industrial & Defence Solutions in Pakistan to co-produce smart guidance kits for defense aviation.

evidence.claim: The UAE and Pakistan advance talks for a Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement in August 2024.
evidence.snippet: The UAE and Pakistan held ministerial discussions to finalize bilateral trade concessions under a proposed CEPA trade pact.

evidence.claim: ADFD provides $50 million in humanitarian and flood rehabilitation aid to Pakistan in October 2024.
evidence.snippet: The Abu Dhabi Fund for Development authorized a $50 million grant to support reconstruction projects in disaster-affected areas of Pakistan.

evidence.claim: Pakistani tech startups secure $30 million in venture funding from UAE-based G42-backed funds in early 2025.
evidence.snippet: G42-linked investment platforms announced a $30 million tech allocation for Pakistani digital infrastructure and fintech startups.

evidence.claim: ADNOC explores investment opportunities in Pakistan's planned greenfield refinery project in late 2025.
evidence.snippet: ADNOC delegations held technical reviews regarding potential feedstock and equity participation in Pakistan's coastal refinery projects.

edges.claim: AD Ports Group invests $220 million in a new bulk and general cargo terminal at Karachi Port in mid-2024.
The UAE rolls over a $2 billion loan deposit at the State Bank of Pakistan in January 2025 to support reserves.
Masdar signs a framework agreement to develop 1 GW of solar power projects in Pakistan in November 2024.
e& finalizes its acquisition of Telenor Pakistan to merge operations with Ufone in late 2024.
DP World signs a framework agreement with Pakistan to build a dedicated freight corridor from Karachi Port in October 2024.
EDGE Group signs a strategic partnership with Pakistan's GIDS for precision-guided munition technology in December 2024.
The UAE and Pakistan advance talks for a Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement in August 2024.
ADFD provides $50 million in humanitarian and flood rehabilitation aid to Pakistan in October 2024.
Pakistani tech startups secure $30 million in venture funding from UAE-based G42-backed funds in early 2025.
ADNOC explores investment opportunities in Pakistan's planned greenfield refinery project in late 2025.
